channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in All Languages (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in All Languages nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🟦 nexu-io/open-design (53173 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nexu-io

📝 Repository: nexu-io/open-design

📄 Descrizione: 🎨 Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative. ⚡ 19 Skills · ✨ 71 brand-grade Design Systems 🖼 Generate web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi CLI.

⭐ Stelle: 53173

🍴 Forks: 6032

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: agent-skills ai-agents ai-design byok claude claude-code-for-design claude-design coding-agents design-systems design-tools desktop-app figma-alternative generative-ai hermes-agent local-first nextjs no-code prototyping ui-generator vibe-coding

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-28T04:25:20Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-27T06:10:26Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 therealaleph/MasterHttpRelayVPN-RUST (3064 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: therealaleph

📝 Repository: therealaleph/MasterHttpRelayVPN-RUST

📄 Descrizione: Rust port of @masterking32's MasterHttpRelayVPN — all credit to @masterking32 for the original idea and Python implementation. Free DPI bypass via a Google Apps Script relay with TLS SNI concealment. CLI + cross-platform desktop UI, HTTP + SOCKS5 proxy, no runtime deps.

⭐ Stelle: 3064

🍴 Forks: 532

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: anti-censorship censorship-circumvention cross-platform desktop-app domain-fronting dpi-bypass egui google-apps-script gui http-proxy iran mitm proxy rust sni socks5 tls

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-21T14:46:31Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-20T05:49:05Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 NVlabs/cuda-oxide (1968 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: NVlabs

📝 Repository: NVlabs/cuda-oxide

📄 Descrizione: cuda-oxide is an experimental Rust-to-CUDA compiler that lets you write (SIMT) GPU kernels in safe(ish), idiomatic Rust. It compiles standard Rust code directly to PTX — no DSLs, no foreign language bindings, just Rust.

⭐ Stelle: 1968

🍴 Forks: 118

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: async compiler-backend cuda gpu heterogeneous-computing high-performance-computing nvidia programming-languages rust

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-22T17:03:09Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-21T05:58:25Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub
